headings.strategy: Clean, authoritative, Apple-like. DO NOT use Inter for headings. Use Manrope for a modern executive feel.

body.strategy: Stripe/Linear style legibility. High clarity for data and dense chat UI.

colors.strategy: Restrained color palette. Monochrome base with Bright Blue for primary actions and Green EXCLUSIVELY for success/growth confirmations.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Extremely soft ambient shadows. shadow-sm or shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] for cards. No harsh drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: Subtle roundness. Use rounded-xl for main cards, rounded-lg for inputs/buttons.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px hairlines border-border/40 to define structure instead of color fills. Linear-style precise borders.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 for sticky headers and the mobile bottom navigation bar. NEVER fully transparent.
visual_enhancers.whitespace: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12 for dashboard containers. Linear and Stripe use whitespace as a structural element.

layouts.mobile: Mobile First strategy. Bottom navigation bar (fixed, bottom-0, glassmorphism) with 5 max options (Dashboard, Chat, Company, History, Settings). No hamburger menu for primary nav.
layouts.desktop: Collapsible left sidebar (w-64). Main content area with max-w-5xl mx-auto and generous side padding (p-8 to p-12).
layouts.dashboard_hero: Central massive input box: '¿Qué decisión necesitas tomar hoy?'. Minimalist, centered in the viewport like Google/ChatGPT homepage.
layouts.history: Gmail-style dense list. Border-bottom separators only. Date, Title, Search. No bulky cards.
layouts.chat: Strategic Committee style. Minimal bubbles, precise typography. Use tags for categories (Marketing, Finanzas).

grids.dashboard_quick_actions: Bento Grid Protocol. grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4. Cards should be flat, rounded-xl, 1px border, subtle hover effect.

motion.strategy: Minimalist and snappy. No bouncy or slow animations.
motion.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-[1px]) and shadow increase for cards. Color shift for buttons.
motion.page_load: Fade in content slightly from bottom (framer-motion opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Focus states must have a high-contrast Bright Blue ring (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2).
accessibility.screen_readers: Aria labels for icon-only buttons (like sidebar collapse).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='decision-input', data-testid='login-button').

image_urls.description: Professional team collaborating on a project. Use with a subtle gradient overlay to ensure text contrast.
Business professionals discussing documents in a modern office.
A clean conference room. Represents the 'Virtual Executive Committee' concept.

components.button: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or gently rounded (rounded-lg). Primary: bg-primary text-white. Secondary: bg-surface border border-border.
components.input: Massive input for the dashboard (h-16 text-xl rounded-2xl). Normal inputs: h-10 rounded-lg. Focus state: Bright blue ring.
components.cards: Cardless approach where possible, or flat with 1px border and very soft shadow. bg-card text-card-foreground.
components.sidebar: Desktop only. Clean links with lucide-react icons. Active state gets a subtle bg-muted fill.
components.bottom_nav: Mobile only. Fixed bottom. Flex justify-around. Icon + tiny text. Active state gets primary color.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Implement Manrope for headings and Inter for body text. Add Manrope via Google Fonts in index.html.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Setup Tailwind colors exactly as defined to support automatic Dark/Light mode detection.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Build the layout components first: a responsive Shell that uses Bottom Nav on mobile and Left Sidebar on desktop.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: The Dashboard must feature the giant input box prominently. It should not look like a standard SaaS metric dashboard. It is a decision engine.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not add unnecessary charts. Follow 'Less is More'.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Use Lucide-react for all icons. Ensure stroke-width is 1.5 for a premium Apple-like feel.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not center align paragraphs or lists. Left-align for reading comfort.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Make this UI distinctively 'Linear/Apple' - which means extreme precision, hairline borders, zero clutter, and sophisticated typography.
NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds for sticky headers or bottom navs. Use glassmorphism.
DO NOT apply universal transitions (transition: all). Target specific properties.
NEVER use emojis for icons. Use lucide-react.
Use 2x more padding inside containers than usual. Whitespace is your primary design tool here.
Create depth through luminance (bg color steps) and hairline borders rather than heavy drop shadows.
